summary: Iteration 30: Tested 3 new features - (1) Partner can view ANY user's step data, (2) Partner selection data sanitization, (3) Completion % calculation excludes steps with duration_value=0. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: User Dashboard form pre-fill, partner selection pre-fill, Partner Dashboard Other Users tab with Details button, Admin Users list with correct completion %.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Admin login successful
BACKEND: digiFORT partner login successful
BACKEND: HC&S partner login successful
BACKEND: Admin GET /api/admin/users returns correct completion_pct (Dr. Schmidt=100%, Dr. Kumar=50%, Dr. Ahmed=0%, Dr. Tanaka=0%)
BACKEND: Partner can view ANY user detail via GET /api/partner/users/{user_id} (no 403 restriction)
BACKEND: Partner can view user who submitted to DIFFERENT partner
BACKEND: Partner selection data is hidden (data={}) when user chose different partner
BACKEND: Partner selection data is visible when user chose THIS partner
BACKEND: Partner submissions endpoint returns correct completion_pct
BACKEND: Partner other-users endpoint returns correct completion_pct
BACKEND: User detail completion_pct correct for Dr. Schmidt (100%)
BACKEND: User detail completion_pct correct for Dr. Kumar (50%)
BACKEND: User detail completion_pct correct for Dr. Ahmed (0%)
BACKEND: Step durations verified - only Steps 3 (4 weeks) and 6 (3 months) have duration_value > 0
FRONTEND: User Dashboard loads correctly for Dr. Kumar
FRONTEND: Navigating back to completed Step 1 shows pre-filled form data (Name, Vorname, Telefon, Adresse)
FRONTEND: Navigating back to completed Step 2 (partner_selection) shows pre-selected partner (HABS e.V.)
FRONTEND: Partner Dashboard loads with My Users (3) and Other Users (7) tabs
FRONTEND: Partner Other Users tab shows Details button for each user
FRONTEND: Partner can click Details button to view user detail overlay
FRONTEND: User detail overlay shows correct completion_pct (100% for Chris)
FRONTEND: Admin Users list shows correct completion_pct for all users
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / Admin123!, Partner (digiFORT): partner@digifort-experts.de / Partner123!, Partner (HC&S): partner@hc-und-s.de / Partner123!, User (Dr. Kumar): dr.kumar@gerdoctor.de / Demo123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 complete. Three features verified: (1) Partner can view ANY user's step data via GET /api/partner/users/{user_id} - no 403 access restriction anymore. (2) Partner selection data is sanitized - if user chose a different partner, data is returned as {} for that step. (3) Completion % calculation now excludes steps with duration_value=0 - only Steps 3 (Meilenstein Antragstellung, 4 weeks) and Step 6 (Meilenstein Kenntnisprüfung, 3 months) count. Expected completion values: Dr. Schmidt (8/8 steps, both 3+6 completed) = 100%, Dr. Kumar (3/8 steps, step 3 completed) = 50%, Dr. Ahmed (1/8 steps, neither 3 nor 6) = 0%, Dr. Tanaka (0/8 steps) = 0%. User Dashboard correctly pre-fills form data and partner selections when navigating back to completed steps.

features_verified.partner_view_any_user_detail: PASS - No 403 restriction, partner can view any user
features_verified.partner_selection_data_sanitization: PASS - Data hidden when user chose different partner
features_verified.partner_dashboard_completion_pct: PASS - Correct percentages in submissions and other-users
features_verified.user_dashboard_form_prefill: PASS - Form data restored when navigating back
features_verified.user_dashboard_partner_selection_prefill: PASS - Partner selection restored when navigating back
features_verified.partner_other_users_details_button: PASS - Details button works and opens user detail overlay
